prerequisites: A Kyriba account with access to your organization's Kyriba domain.
Your Kyriba domain (the `domain` config field), which identifies your Kyriba environment.
A valid Kyriba username (the `username` config field) and its password (the `password` secret field) authorized for API access.
A start date (the `start_date` config field) from which data syncing should begin; optionally an end date (`end_date`) to bound the sync window.

authMethods.name: Basic authentication (username and password)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with your Kyriba `username` and `password` using HTTP basic authentication against your Kyriba `domain`. The `password` is the only secret field; the `username` and `domain` are supplied as non-secret config. Per the Airbyte Kyriba connector docs, you input your username and password for basic authentication against the configured domain.

setupSteps.title: Obtain your Kyriba domain and credentials
setupSteps.body: Identify your organization's Kyriba `domain` and a `username` / `password` pair authorized for API access in your Kyriba environment. Credentials are provisioned through Kyriba; the Kyriba Developer Portal (developer.kyriba.com) hosts the API documentation.

setupSteps.title: Enter the domain
setupSteps.body: Set the `domain` field to your Kyriba domain. This identifies the Kyriba environment the connector will call.

setupSteps.title: Provide basic authentication credentials
setupSteps.body: Set `username` to your Kyriba username and `password` to its password. The connector uses these for basic authentication against your domain. The `password` is stored as a secret.

setupSteps.title: Set the sync date range
setupSteps.body: Set `start_date` to the date from which data syncing should commence (required). Optionally set `end_date` to bound the end of the sync window (optional); leave it empty to sync up to the present.
